title: Fatal House Fire Under Investigation in Union County
summary: A house fire in Union County early Easter Sunday resulted in one fatality. Officials are investigating the cause of the fire.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of fire safety and the potential for accidental tragedies in residential areas.

title: Missing Matthews Teen Found Safe
summary: A missing teenager from Matthews has been found safe, according to police reports. She was located Sunday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Offers relief and underscores the effectiveness of community and police efforts in locating missing persons.

title: Victim Identified in West Charlotte Fatal Crash
summary: Authorities have identified the victim of a deadly car crash on Yorkmont Road in west Charlotte. The cause of the collision is under investigation.
charlotte_impact: Road safety concerns and the ongoing investigation into the cause of the crash.

title: Man Killed After Being Struck by Two Cars in Charlotte
summary: A man died after being hit by two vehicles on East Independence Boulevard. Police confirmed the drivers were not speeding or impaired.
charlotte_impact: Pedestrian safety issues and the tragic consequences of traffic accidents, even when drivers are not at fault.

title: Teen Charged with Murder in Pageland Shooting Death
summary: A teenage suspect has surrendered in connection with the fatal shooting of a 16-year-old in Pageland, facing murder and weapon charges.
charlotte_impact: Youth violence and the serious consequences of gun-related incidents involving teenagers.

title: Man Faces Attempted Murder Charge After Violent Home Attack in NoDa
summary: Aleksandros Soutzos is accused of beating a man, setting his house on fire, and assaulting a woman in a domestic-related incident in NoDa.
charlotte_impact: Domestic violence and the extreme acts of violence that can occur in such situations.

title: Rain on Easter Sunday Brings Relief
summary: Easter Sunday brought cooler temperatures and much-needed rain to the region, alleviating severe drought conditions.
charlotte_impact: The importance of rainfall in mitigating drought and its impact on local agriculture and water resources.

title: Shooting in Southeast Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was shot on Pineburr Road, off Monroe Road, in southeast Charlotte. Medic confirmed the incident.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence and its impact on community safety in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: Woman Accused of Assaulting Officer with Car
summary: Tanaezah Austin was arrested for allegedly hitting a Charlotte-Mecklenburg police officer with her car, following a previous assault charge in April.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement officers and repeat offenders.

title: Victim Identified in Rock Hill Interstate Crash
summary: The York County Coroner has identified the victim of a deadly interstate crash in Rock Hill as a 37-year-old woman.
charlotte_impact: The dangers of highway driving and the tragic consequences of car accidents.

title: Infant Mortality Disparities Persist in Mecklenburg County
summary: Mecklenburg County sees improvements in infant mortality rates, but health disparities continue to endanger Black infants.
charlotte_impact: Addresses health equity and the need for targeted interventions to reduce disparities in infant mortality.

title: Two Injured in University City Rollover Crash
summary: Two people were injured in a rollover crash on University City Boulevard near the exit to I-485.
charlotte_impact: Road safety and the potential for serious injuries in rollover accidents.

title: Police Search for Man Accused of Firing into Crowded Parking Lot
summary: Kings Mountain Police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr., accused of firing shots in a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence and the risk to public safety in crowded areas.

title: Man Airlifted After Shooting in Kershaw; Investigation Underway
summary: A man was airlifted to a hospital after being shot outside a home in Lancaster County. The sheriff's office is investigating.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence and the severity of injuries resulting from shootings.

title: Pedestrian Hospitalized After Being Hit by Vehicle
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized after being hit by a vehicle on Albemarle Road at Hollirose Drive Friday evening.
charlotte_impact: Pedestrian safety and the risks associated with crossing busy roads.
